localized title: Marcel the Shell with Shoes On
plot outline: Marcel is an adorable, 1-inch-tall shell who ekes out a colorful existence with his grandmother, Connie, and their pet lint, Alan. Once part of a sprawling community of shells, they now live alone as the sole survivors of a mysterious tragedy. However, when a documentary filmmaker discovers them, the short film he posts online brings Marcel millions of passionate fans, as well as unprecedented dangers and a new hope of finding his long-lost family.
title: Marcel the Shell with Shoes On
original title: Marcel the Shell with Shoes On
akas: 穿着鞋子的贝壳马塞尔 (China, Mandarin title)
